assertions.reason: Built CLI rejected an all-invalid --source selection with exit code 2 and machine-readable invalid_source JSON instead of broadening scope.

evidence.observation: stdout contained status=error with error.code=invalid_source and no paper results.

assertions.reason: Built CLI listed IEEE/ACM as gated without keys, rejected clean-env IEEE search with a gated_source error, and switched both sources to searchable when key env vars were supplied.

evidence.observation: Clean-env source listing showed ieee/acm enabled=false with capabilities.search=gated.
Clean-env ieee search exited 3 with error.code=gated_source and blocked_sources entry for ieee.
Keyed source listing showed ieee/acm enabled=true with capabilities.search=supported.

assertions.reason: Built CLI executed the valid subset and preserved invalid ids in the machine-readable invalid_sources field.

evidence.observation: Response kept used_sources=["unpaywall"] and invalid_sources=["typo"] with a successful JSON envelope.

assertions.reason: Targeted CLI test passed for both DOI-only Unpaywall search and the free-text soft-fail path.

evidence.observation: Passing subtests covered DOI query => one normalized unpaywall result and free-text query => zero results without crash.

assertions.reason: Targeted CLI test confirmed the all-selected-sources failure path stays machine-readable with zero counts and explicit per-source errors.

evidence.observation: Passing test asserts exit code 4, total=0, zero source counts, and explicit source error entries when every selected source fails.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
